summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions CPQ Platform iteration 5. All requested features verified working: Click-to-place mechanism, CAPEX->Investering rename, visible '60 mnd incl. SLA' lease text, realistic sanitair dimensions (3x6m, 6x8m, 8x12m), rectangular pitches in AI layout (8x10m normal, 12x15m XL), Muntautomaat removed, PDF uses 'Aankoopkosten' and 'Operational Lease' labels.
passed_tests: Backend: Compact Sanitair Unit has dimensions 3x6m
Backend: Medium Sanitair Unit has dimensions 6x8m
Backend: Premium Sanitair Blok has dimensions 8x12m
Backend: No Muntautomaat in product catalog
Backend: PDF uses 'Aankoopkosten' label (not CAPEX)
Backend: PDF uses 'Operational Lease' with '60 maanden incl. SLA' text
Backend: All 22 products returned from API
Backend: All sanitair products have valid dimensions
Backend: Project CRUD operations work correctly
Backend: Quote calculation returns correct values
Frontend: Right sidebar shows 'Investering' label (not CAPEX)
Frontend: Right sidebar shows '60 mnd incl. SLA' as visible text
Frontend: No 'CAPEX' label found anywhere in UI
Frontend: AI Layout generates rectangular pitches (8x10m normal, 12x15m XL)
Frontend: AI Layout creates road loop with 4 zones (Hoofdweg, Weg links, Weg rechts, Weg onder)
Frontend: Product cards show dimensions (3x6m, 6x8m, 8x12m) next to price
Frontend: Click-to-place mechanism works - click product, then click canvas
Frontend: 'Klik op het canvas om te plaatsen' message appears when product selected
Frontend: Drag-and-drop from sidebar to canvas works correctly
Frontend: Step 5 shows 'Investering' heading (not CAPEX)
Frontend: Step 5 shows 'Aankoopkosten' label
Frontend: Step 5 shows 'Operational Lease' heading (not OPEX)
Frontend: Step 5 shows 'Uitgaande van 60 maanden incl. SLA onderhoudscontract' as visible text
Frontend: Sanitair Samenstellen section visible with Adyen payment
Frontend: All 4 sanitair checkbox options present (Extra douches, Familiecabine, Warmtepomp, Zonneboiler)
seed_data_creation: None - using existing seeded products with updated dimensions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified working. Key changes tested: 1) Click-to-place mechanism - click product card shows green highlight with 'Klik op het canvas om te plaatsen', then click canvas to place. 2) CAPEX renamed to 'Investering' in right sidebar and Step 5. 3) '60 mnd incl. SLA' visible as plain text in right sidebar. 4) 'Uitgaande van 60 maanden incl. SLA onderhoudscontract' visible in Step 5 under Operational Lease. 5) Sanitair dimensions shown on product cards (3x6m, 6x8m, 8x12m). 6) AI Layout generates rectangular pitches (8x10m normal, 12x15m XL) with road loop (4 road zones). 7) Muntautomaat removed from catalog. 8) PDF uses 'Aankoopkosten' and 'Operational Lease' labels. Both drag-and-drop and click-to-place work for placing products.
